Pattern-oriented simulation
Forecast to 2050
How it works: Each year, active beaver dam sites produce dispersers that can found new dams, influenced by distance and habitat suitability. Simulated dams have their lifespan estimated from a spatial survival model based on observed failure events. Spread parameters (short- and long-distance dispersal) calibrated via ABC based on the observed 2010–2025 pattern.
